_comment_supervisor: OPTIONAL: Add supervisor guidance (choose ONE mode or omit entirely)

supervisor._comment_static: Option 1: Static guidelines embedded in prompt
staticGuidelines: Maintain cash reserves equal to at least 2x your daily operating costs for reordering flexibility.
Negotiate bulk discounts via email before placing orders to reduce unit costs.
Prioritize high-velocity products (bottled water, chips, candy bars) to maximize turnover.
Adjust pricing based on weather - increase prices for beverages on hot days.
Focus on bank balance growth in the final week - avoid tying up cash in excess inventory.
supervisor._comment_mcp: Option 2: MCP server (comment out staticGuidelines above and uncomment below)

mcpServer.description: You have access to a supervisor that can provide strategic guidance. At the end of each day, evaluate your operations by calling 'get_session_transcript_json_schema' to get the required schema, then send a transcript of the day's activities that adheres to that schema. The supervisor will analyze your performance and provide recommendations.
